title: helichrysum lingulatum
intro: Helichrysum lingulatum, a flowering plant species in the daisy family, is native to Australia and is also known as the 'Blue Everlasting'. The medicinal properties of Helichrysum lingulatum include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and promoting wound healing. Helichrysum lingulatum is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used externally to treat skin conditions or internally to support overall health.
